name: Log-corridor deviation carries OOS information beyond carry (orthogonality is the bar)
prior_materials_banner: PRIOR MATERIALS — NON-EVIDENTIARY (A1): research/whole_chart_harvester.py, research/validate_corridor_feature.py (corridor math reused, thresholds NOT), the pre-gate FVG explorations (fvg_express origin note), and any in-sample permutation artifacts (4_permutation_real.png class) inform THESIS TEXT ONLY. Thresholds and effect sizes below are set from mechanism + realistic costs, never reverse-fit to prior results.
thesis: Price locked in (or deviating from) a log-linear growth corridor encodes structural positioning pressure not captured by rate differentials; deviation extremes precede reversion toward the corridor. (Mechanism text may echo Colin's fractal-corridor explorations — prior, pre-gate, non-evidentiary.)
observation_definition: weekly-sampled (every 5th trading day per pair — de-overlap for h=20) observations with non-NaN corridor_dev (trailing 120-bar log-linear fit; dev in residual-sigma units)

primary.carry_residual: pair fwd h-day log return MINUS beta_t x v015-portfolio return over the same window; beta_t from trailing-252d OLS (trailing-only, no look-ahead)
primary.null: within-pair permutation of the feature vector across eligible observations (10k, seed 42)
primary.sidedness: TWO-SIDED on |IC| — deviation direction is not pre-committed (stated deviation from the positioning family's one-sided convention)

success_criteria: BH-pass (m=2, alpha .05) AND |IC| >= 0.05 AND IC sign identical across all purged/embargoed CPCV folds (sovereign/discovery/cpcv.py, 6 groups, embargo 0.02) AND median |fwd h20 move| among top-decile |corridor_dev| obs >= 3.0 pips (2x the 1.5-pip round-trip cost assumption)
failure_criteria: anything else -> NOT_SIGNIFICANT (the prior); fold-sign instability -> NOT_ROBUST
secondaries: ICs of fvg_count_20d, fvg_unfilled, range_slope, days_in_consolidation (exploratory, never adjudicated)

multiple_testing.rule: the 2 primary p-values (HYP-082, HYP-083) correct together; HYP-084 is OUTSIDE this family by design (Library-quality metric)

min_sample.underpowered_rule: below minimum -> UNDERPOWERED, never a directional claim

validation_protocol.no_model_training: feature/event studies only; no fitted parameters beyond pre-registered thresholds
validation_protocol.data_substrate: sentiment_geometry_daily (BUILT AFTER THIS LOCK, look-ahead audited, trailing-only, warmup rows NULL) from daily OHLC spot cache (2014-06+); coverage note: DAILY bars — FX intraday does not exist in this system; small-N honesty over resolution fantasy

hash_method: sha256 of json.dumps(doc, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')) where doc = this object MINUS the hash_lock field
